name: MobinHost
notes: Excellent Tehran DC, actively synced for Debian, Ubuntu, Arch. Highly recommended.

name: IranServer
notes: Good commercial mirror with full Debian support (confirmed /debian/ structure).

name: ArvanCloud
notes: High-speed CDN, supports Debian, Ubuntu, Arch and more.

name: Shatel
notes: Popular Iranian ISP mirror. Good for Debian and Ubuntu.

name: IUT (Isfahan University)
notes: University mirror. Paths may vary (uses /repo/ prefix for some distros). Will be validated automatically.
